description: Update the theater costume inventory in /home/ga/Documents/costume_inventory.xlsx. Mark returned items as available, flag damaged costumes with repair notes, and apply conditional formatting to highlight items needing attention.

natural_language.prompt: Update the costume inventory spreadsheet. Mark the Victorian Jacket, Medieval Tunic, and Top Hat as Available (they were returned). The Victorian Jacket has a torn sleeve and the Medieval Tunic has a wine stain - mark these as Damaged and add notes describing the damage. Apply conditional formatting to highlight all damaged items in red or orange.
